description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male religious figure, dressed in ornate liturgical vestments with intricate gold patterns. He holds an open book in his left hand and gestures with his right, suggesting a moment of teaching or blessing. The figure features a finely detailed face with a short beard and a contemplative expression. A decorative, circular halo with a filigree design is attached behind his head, emphasizing his sanctity. The sculpture stands on a multi-tiered, hexagonal pedestal with gold accents, adding to its sense of reverence and importance. The overall color palette includes cream, gold, and subtle red highlights, with realistic texturing on the garments and base.
description: A detailed sculpture of a male religious figure in ornate vestments, holding a book and adorned with a decorative halo, standing on a gold-accented pedestal.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the figure's face, open book, and detailed vestments with the halo clearly visible behind the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the thickness of the book, and the draping of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the ornate robe and the intricate design of the halo, with the pedestal base visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's arm position, the side of the book, and the layered garment details.
attribute_subject_matter: male religious figure holding a book with a halo
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
